reference: I have asthma very badly, and my stomach is badly protruding. I have stopped breathing three or four times and have been intubated two or three times, plus I have had a tracheostomy. The tracheostomy has been gone since February one, two thousand and twelve. I need it gone so badly. I have a man who loves me, but I won't let him touch me at all. I cry when I try to. I have moved out of the room and now I sleep on the floor in the living room. Please, please, please help me. I feel like dying. I won't marry him like this.
